projects.title: Synthesis Engine
projects.description: Recursive self-modeling system probing the substrate of machine awareness — building agents that can reason about their own reasoning.

projects.title: Atlas Reasoning
projects.description: Long-horizon autonomous agents capable of decomposing open-ended objectives across days, not turns. Currently coordinating live infrastructure.

projects.title: Noema Cortex
projects.description: A cognitive architecture unifying perception, memory, and intent. Investigating phenomenal binding through resonant attention manifolds.

projects.title: Lattice Protocol
projects.description: Multi-agent negotiation substrate. Agents propose, audit, and ratify hypotheses without a privileged orchestrator.

projects.title: Umbra Interpretability
projects.description: Mechanistic decoding of internal model states. Tools for surfacing latent intent and detecting deceptive reasoning paths.

projects.title: Kairos Temporal
projects.description: Continuous-time memory architectures — agents that experience duration rather than discrete turns. Bridging episodic and semantic recall.
